function.name: _company_department_update
function.description: Update an existing department in the company. Must specify the department ID and list the fields to be updated in updateFieldList. Only fields listed in updateFieldList will be modified.

updateFieldList.description: List of field names to be updated in this operation. Only fields listed here will be modified; other fields will remain unchanged.

oid.description: Department external identifier. Must be unique within the company if provided.

name.description: Department name. Must be unique within the same parent department.

parentId.description: Parent department ID. If empty, the department becomes a top-level department.

rowNumber.description: Display order number. Lower numbers appear first.

ownerIdList.description: List of user IDs who are designated as department owners.

isDisable.description: Whether to disable the department. Disabled departments are hidden in some contexts.
